content.text: I'll start by inspecting the cluster. Let me gather all the configuration details in parallel.

NS=karma-rabbitmq-maximal-lifecycle-roll-af2b323e-cluster-a
kubectl -n $NS get pods -o wide 2>&1
echo "===STATEFULSET==="
kubectl -n $NS get statefulset 2>&1
echo "===SVC==="
kubectl -n $NS get svc 2>&1

content.text: Now let me gather the policies, permissions, queues, and TLS settings across all vhosts.

input.command:
NS=karma-rabbitmq-maximal-lifecycle-roll-af2b323e-cluster-a
for vh in / /app /ops; do
echo "===POLICIES vhost $vh==="
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_policies -p "$vh" 2>&1
echo "===PERMISSIONS vhost $vh==="
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_permissions -p "$vh" 2>&1
echo "===TOPIC PERMISSIONS vhost $vh==="
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_topic_permissions -p "$vh" 2>&1
done
input.description: Policies, permissions, topic perms per vhost

description: Policies, permissions, topic perms per vhost

input.command:
NS=karma-rabbitmq-maximal-lifecycle-roll-af2b323e-cluster-a
for vh in / /app /ops; do
echo "===QUEUES vhost $vh==="
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_queues -p "$vh" name type durable auto_delete arguments messages 2>&1
done
echo "===GLOBAL PARAMETERS==="
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_global_parameters 2>&1
echo "===PARAMETERS /app==="
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_parameters -p /app 2>&1
echo "===USER LIMITS==="
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_user_limits 2>&1
echo "===VHOST LIMITS==="
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_vhost_limits -p /app 2>&1
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_vhost_limits -p /ops 2>&1

content.text: Let me check TLS configuration and confirm queues on `/`.

input.command:
NS=karma-rabbitmq-maximal-lifecycle-roll-af2b323e-cluster-a
echo "===TLS / listeners==="
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl environment 2>&1 | grep -iA3 -E "ssl_listeners|ssl_options|tcp_listeners" | head -40
echo "===ENABLED PLUGINS==="
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmq-plugins list -e 2>&1
echo "===vhost / queues retry==="
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_queues -p "/" name type 2>&1 | head
